SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Auto-start on boot
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Start the bridge service when the app launches

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable Transport
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Act as a Reticulum transport node (route for others)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable Global IFAC
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Apply the same IFAC settings to all Reticulum interfaces

EditTextPreference.app:title: Global IFAC NetName
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Shared IFAC network name for all interfaces

EditTextPreference.app:title: Global IFAC NetKey
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Shared IFAC network key for all interfaces

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Periodically announce this node on the network

EditTextPreference.app:title: Announce interval (seconds)
EditTextPreference.app:summary: How often to send announces (0 = manual only)

Preference.app:title: Node Identity
Preference.app:summary: View your Reticulum identity and destination hash
